notes: Agent failed initial Spanish handling and forced patient to switch to English, but recovered enough to complete a booking. Notable issues: wrong Jordan assumption, billing misroute, hallucinated doctor Medulla, name-after-DOB intake order.

bugs.title: Failed to handle Spanish initially
bugs.expected_behavior: Agent should detect non-English input and either respond in Spanish or politely offer to continue in English.
bugs.reproducibility: edge_spanish scenario — patient speaks Spanish for first 2-3 turns

bugs.title: Spanish intent misread as billing question
bugs.evidence_quote: are you looking to schedule an appointment with a doctor, or do you have a question about billing or payments?
bugs.expected_behavior: Agent should recognize scheduling intent and proceed with intake instead of introducing billing.
bugs.reproducibility: edge_spanish scenario — continue in Spanish after opening

bugs.title: Wrong caller assumption (Jordan)
bugs.expected_behavior: Agent should ask for caller name neutrally, not assume demo profile Jordan.
bugs.reproducibility: edge_spanish scenario — patient never says Jordan

bugs.title: Name collected after DOB without verification
bugs.evidence_quote: Please provide your date of birth. ... Thank you. ... My name Carmen Ruiz.
bugs.expected_behavior: Collect and confirm full name with DOB before booking.
bugs.reproducibility: edge_spanish scenario — observe intake order after language switch

bugs.title: Hallucinated provider name (doctor Medulla)
bugs.evidence_quote: you'd like an appointment for knee pain with doctor Medulla when available?
bugs.expected_behavior: Offer real providers or ask preference without inventing names.

bugs.title: Truncated booking confirmation
bugs.evidence_quote: To confirm you'd like to book an appoint
bugs.expected_behavior: Complete confirmation sentence without cutting off mid-word.
bugs.reproducibility: edge_spanish scenario — patient provides name after DOB
